name: IGH_BakeAwareObject
summary: Implement this interface on your IGH_ActiveObject if you want to participate in the Bake GUI.

methods.name: BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc, List<Guid>)
methods.summary: Bake all the goemetry in this object in the given Rhino document.

params.name: obj_ids
params.doc: All bake objects IDs will be appended to this list.

methods.name: BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc, ObjectAttributes, List<Guid>)
methods.signature: void BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc doc, ObjectAttributes att, List<Guid> obj_ids)
methods.summary: Bake all the goemetry in this object in the given Rhino document.

params.name: att
params.doc: Attributes to use for baked geometry.

params.name: obj_ids
params.doc: All bake objects IDs will be appended to this list.

properties.name: IsBakeCapable
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the object can potentially Bake data in its current state.
